task_completion.description: Verify the webhook name is set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an input field labeled 'Name' in the WooCommerce webhook settings containing the exact text 'Fulfillment Dispatch - New Orders'.

task_completion.description: Verify the webhook status is set to Active.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a dropdown or selection field labeled 'Status' set to 'Active'.

task_completion.description: Verify the webhook topic is set to Order created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a dropdown or selection field labeled 'Topic' set to 'Order created' (or 'order.created').

task_completion.description: Verify the delivery URL is set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an input field labeled 'Delivery URL' containing the exact URL 'https://hooks.fulfillment-partner.example.com/wc/orders'.

task_completion.description: Verify the secret is set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an input field labeled 'Secret' containing the exact string 'fh8K2mNpQx7vR4wT'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web browser GUI to configure the webhook.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show a web browser displaying the WordPress/WooCommerce admin dashboard, not a terminal or script editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual WooCommerce application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should clearly be the WooCommerce settings page (typically under WooCommerce > Settings > Advanced > Webhooks), with standard WordPress admin menus visible.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not just copy the task description into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The configuration values must be entered into the specific form fields of the WooCommerce webhook configuration page, not written in a plain text file or notes app.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected webhook configuration values are: Name: 'Fulfillment Dispatch - New Orders', Status: 'Active' (or 'active'), Topic: 'Order created' (or 'order.created'), Delivery URL: 'https://hooks.fulfillment-partner.example.com/wc/orders', Secret: 'fh8K2mNpQx7vR4wT'. These must be entered in the WooCommerce Webhook Data settings form.
